texto: By the end of the millennium, despite the continuing excitement of the field, almost thirty years of a detour from chemistry to medical imaging began to pall, and I changed my focus to a field of chemical research, just in time for my past to catch up with me in the form of a Nobel Prize. All detours should be so productive!
explicacao: Orientação direta de Paul Lauterbur sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “By the end of the millennium, despite the continuing excitement of the field, almost thirty years…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, time, focus, útil em momentos de mudanca e termino.
